items.title: Swiggy Improves Search Autocomplete Using Real Time Machine Learning Ranking
items.summaryShort: Swiggy Improves Search Autocomplete Using Real Time Machine Learning Ranking. Swiggy detailed real-time machine-learning ranking system for autocomplete built on OpenSearch.

items.title: Article: Building a Secure MCP Server on AWS for a Million-Company B2B Platform

items.title: Podcast: Context is the Key to the Agentic Architecture Revolution: A Conversation with Baruch Sadogursky
items.summaryShort: Podcast: Context is the Key to the Agentic Architecture Revolution: A Conversation with Baruch Sadogursky. Michael Stiefel spoke to Baruch Sadogursky about software architecture in the age of agentic AI.

items.title: Kin Health raises $9M to build an AI notetaker for patients
items.summaryShort: Kin Health raises $9M to build an AI notetaker for patients. The app is similar to a meeting notetaker: you can record doctor visits, and it will return an AI summary of the meeting, with the next steps, all of which you share with family a

items.title: Amazon's new Alexa+ powered feature can generate podcast episodes
items.summaryShort: Amazon's new Alexa+ powered feature can generate podcast episodes. Amazon’s Alexa+ can now generate custom AI podcasts on demand, as the company expands its assistant into a personalized AI content platform.

items.title: Open source tool maker Grafana Labs says hackers stole its code, refuses to pay ransom
items.summaryShort: Open source tool maker Grafana Labs says hackers stole its code, refuses to pay ransom. The open source project said hackers stole its codebase and threatened to publish its source code if the company did not pay.
